intro: A dark narrative thriller set in the 1940s. Sin, secrets, and shadows lurk in the halls of the rectory.
description:
Play as Father Mathias Marton, a revered priest trapped in a web of forbidden desires and sinister events. Uncover the mysteries of a corrupt rectory, confront your own demons, and walk the blurred line between sin and salvation.
AN ENTHRALLING MYSTERY
Who was she? Why does her presence still linger? How did it all come to this? Why did you taste the forbidden fruit? And above all: WHAT HAVE YOU DONE, FATHER?
AN IMMERSIVE EXPERIENCE
Embark on a brief but deeply captivating narrative journey that blends exploration, cinematics, light puzzles, and gripping dialogue.
• EXPLORE THE ENIGMATIC RECTORY
Uncover the layers of a disturbing story as you roam the shadowed halls. Will you leave a stain, or redeem its corrupted legacy?
• MEET QUESTIONABLE CHARACTERS AND UNCOVER THEIR SECRETS
Speak with the mysterious residents of the rectory and delve into their pasts through diary entries and hidden notes.
• FACE UNHOLY MANIFESTATIONS
Brace yourself as you grapple with the tangible and the supernatural in equal measure.
• DISCOVER OPTIONAL CONTENT
Hidden throughout the rectory are titillating magazines — you'll be surprised by the secrets they hold! Uncover the turbulent history of the rectory by finding old photographs of former priests along with the stories of their lives.
Will you emerge purified, or succumb to the shadows lurking within? Explore this atmospheric tale and uncover the truth hidden beneath the collar. Your path to redemption awaits.
